summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Roles and Permissions Management System. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for login with Bearer token, user management (create/edit/delete), and permissions matrix configuration. The 5 specific roles (Administrador, Gestor de Personal, Gestor de Logística, Gestor de Archivo, Gestor Económico) are correctly implemented and synchronized between backend and frontend.

issues: RoleBadge component uses hardcoded role names (admin, manager, editor, viewer) instead of the 5 specific roles. The badge shows 'personal' and 'logistica' as plain text without proper styling. Consider updating RoleBadge to use the actual role names from the API.

passed_tests: Backend: Login returns access_token for Authorization Bearer header usage
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: GET /api/auth/me works with Bearer token
Backend: GET /api/admin/roles returns 5 specific roles (admin, personal, logistica, archivo, economico)
Backend: Roles endpoint requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns user list without password_hash
Backend: Create user with 'personal' role
Backend: Update user role from 'personal' to 'logistica'
Backend: Delete user and verify removal
Backend: GET /api/admin/permissions-config returns permissions
Backend: POST /api/admin/permissions-config saves and persists permissions matrix
Backend: GET /api/admin/roles-config returns roles configuration
Backend: POST /api/admin/roles-config saves roles configuration
Backend: GET /api/user/permissions returns 'all' for admin
Backend: Non-admin user gets role-specific permissions
Backend: Send credentials endpoint (MOCKED) returns success message
Frontend: Login page loads correctly
Frontend: Login with admin credentials stores token in localStorage
Frontend: Dashboard loads after login
Frontend: Navigation to Gestión de Usuarios works
Frontend: Users table displays with 5 role cards
Frontend: Create new user modal opens and form works
Frontend: User created with 'personal' role appears in table
Frontend: Edit user modal opens and role can be changed
Frontend: User role updated from 'personal' to 'logistica'
Frontend: Navigation to Gestión de Permisos works
Frontend: Permissions matrix displays with 9 sections and 5 roles
Frontend: Permission sections are expandable
Frontend: Save permissions button works
critical_code_review_comments: RoleBadge component in GestionUsuarios.js uses hardcoded role mappings (admin, manager, editor, viewer) that don't match the 5 specific roles. The component should use the roles from the API response for consistent styling.
seed_data_creation: Created test users during testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Roles and Permissions system fully tested. 5 roles (admin, personal, logistica, archivo, economico) working correctly. Permissions matrix with 9 sections saves and retrieves correctly. User CRUD operations working. Bearer token authentication working via localStorage. MOCKED: /api/admin/users/{id}/send-credentials endpoint simulates email sending.

mocked_apis_list: /api/admin/users/{user_id}/send-credentials - simulates email sending, returns success message but doesn't actually send email
